latest.title: Dogs see the sunset colors you miss
latest.script_key: the sunset looks different to dogs their eyes pick up blues and yellows we can t see that s why golden grass glows green to them so next sunset picture what your dog is actually seeing did she ever notice that

latest.title: Lion cubs aren’t born hunters they’re born climbers
latest.script_key: future predator nah that lion cub isn t learning to hunt it s learning to climb because lions don t chase prey up trees that s why they re the only big cats that climb so young watch those little claws dig in see how the trunk wobbles they re figuring out safety not strength

latest.title: Dragonflies see every insect's weak spot
